description:

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2090

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2090.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

python3.12-wheel-wheel-0.41.2-4.el8_10.noarch.rpm

SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/python3.12-wheel-0.41.2-4.el8_10.src.rpm
